findings.description: learn:profile re-implements JSON extraction and command parsing while _internal/json-parser.js already exists.
findings.title: Duplicate JSON parsing logic in learn:profile instead of shared helper
findings.suggested_issue: Refactor docs to import shared helpers to reduce drift.

findings.description: learn:plan directly reads/writes .workflow/learn/state.json while other components emphasize ccw learn:* APIs for locking and validation.
findings.title: Direct Read/Write in learn:plan conflicts with CLI State API design
findings.suggested_issue: Standardize on CLI State API for state/session IO or enforce locks for direct writes.

findings.description: mcp-runner writes a large JS string to a temp runner file; auditing sandbox behavior is harder than a dedicated module.
findings.title: Long inline runner string in mcp-runner is hard to audit
findings.suggested_issue: Extract runner into a checked-in module and copy it into tmpDir.

findings.snippet: new Ajv({ allErrors: true, strict: false })
findings.description: Ajv configured with strict:false can hide schema mistakes.
findings.title: Ajv strict mode disabled for learn validators
findings.suggested_issue: Consider strict:"log" during development or CI.
